title: Selecting and dragging multiple items
excerpt:
Hello everyone, I am fairly new to Monday.com. Can you please guide me as to how can I not only select multiple items but be able to drag them up and down in a group. Now when I try to do that, it just drags one item. 
  …

posts.author: MediaVoice (Ali Ahmed Brohi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone, I am fairly new to Monday.com. Can you please guide me as to how can I not only select multiple items but be able to drag them up and down in a group. Now when I try to do that, it just drags one item.

image975×848 84.3 KB

posts.author: MHaigh (Matthew Haigh)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can select multiple items - hover of the small coloud block just to the left of the item name, it will open up and you can tick each item you want (you can also use shift to select a block or items).
A menu will also appear offering you options to delete, move, etc… this is more reliable than drag/drop.

You can also use the sort order, to sort columns before selecting which can be useful.
